title: Copper Shields
description: Copper Shields - Makes shields craftable with copper, because copper is too useless
body:
![Recipe of a shield using copper instead of iron](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fc401592a7c76e976f4734c533829c86aaa3b12.png)

A transcript of my thoughts while playing Minecraft the other day:

> "Damn, copper is useless."
> 
> "Ugh... I need to craft a shield."
> 
> ".......💡EUREKA!!!"

Makes shields craftable with copper over iron, giving one slightly functional use to Copper!!
